creator: avilla@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->patched

There is no such a problem anymore as ffmpeg-devel can be installed 
along with ffmpeg (and CMake has no trivial way to detect it), so K3B 
depends on ffmpeg only. Nonetheless, we'll commit the patches to the 
ports tree to help anyone with custom ffmpeg installations. Setting the 
PR as "patched" as area51 was already updated.
